hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$skill = Get-Content -Raw '.claude/skills/karpathy-guidelines/SKILL.MD'; $out = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'UserPromptSubmit'; additionalContext = "Apply these behavioral guidelines to your response:`n$skill" } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress; Write-Output $out"
